economic_notes: Nation holds 99.99% interest in Xat'Sull Limited Partnership (revenues $1,754,861, expenses $1,182,593), 50% interest in Likely Xat'Sull Community Forest Ltd., 51% interest in Xatsull T'micw Resources LLP, 100% of Xat'sull Logging Ltd and Xat'sull Development Ltd. Equity income from investments $622,544. Ranch operations (Carpenter Mountain Ranch) with livestock sales of $835,197. Archaeology projects revenue $315,583.
notes: Large increase in revenue year-over-year ($17.4M vs $10.2M) largely driven by Province of BC funding ($7.3M vs $2.97M prior year) and interest income ($1.0M vs $420K). Annual surplus of $8.39M includes $2.03M in tangible capital asset acquisitions funded by government and $622K equity income from investments. No long-term debt identified on balance sheet. Three GBEs accounted for by equity method: Xat'Sull Limited Partnership (99.99%), Likely Xat'Sull Community Forest Ltd. (50%), and Xatsull T'micw Resources LLP (51%). No remuneration schedule provided in the financial statements. Total government transfers estimated to include ISC ($4,017,389), NSTS ($434,014), Three Corners Health ($431,248), FNHA ($222,850), CCATEC ($67,241), CMHC ($75,000), NSTC ($381,991), Canada Summer Jobs ($73,640), Province of BC ($7,315,207), New Relationship Trust ($260,000) totalling approximately $13,278,580.
